allow: Bash(python -c "import autogen; import PIL; print\('Dependencies OK'\)")
Bash(python painter_critic.py --subject "a simple red circle on white background" --rounds 1)
Bash(python painter_critic.py --subject "a sunset over the ocean with orange sky and calm water" --rounds 10)

Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw; canvas = Image.new\('RGB', \(200, 200\), \(255, 255, 255\)\); draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(canvas\); draw.ellipse\([\(0, 0\), \(19, 19\)], fill=\(0, 255, 0\)\); print\('\(0,0\):', canvas.getpixel\(\(0, 0\)\)\); print\('\(10,10\):', canvas.getpixel\(\(10, 10\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw; canvas = Image.new\('RGB', \(200, 200\), \(255, 255, 255\)\); draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(canvas\); draw.ellipse\([\(0, 0\), \(20, 20\)], fill=\(0, 255, 0\)\); print\('\(0,0\):', canvas.getpixel\(\(0, 0\)\)\); print\('\(10,10\):', canvas.getpixel\(\(10, 10\)\)\); print\('\(20,20\):', canvas.getpixel\(\(20, 20\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw; canvas = Image.new\('RGB', \(200, 200\), \(255, 255, 255\)\); draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(canvas\); draw.ellipse\([\(0, 0\), \(40, 40\)], fill=\(0, 255, 0\)\); print\('\(0,0\):', canvas.getpixel\(\(0, 0\)\)\); print\('\(1,1\):', canvas.getpixel\(\(1, 1\)\)\); print\('\(2,0\):', canvas.getpixel\(\(2, 0\)\)\); print\('\(20,20\):', canvas.getpixel\(\(20, 20\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw; canvas = Image.new\('RGB', \(200, 200\), \(255, 255, 255\)\); draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(canvas\); draw.ellipse\([\(80, 80\), \(120, 120\)], fill=\(0, 255, 0\)\); print\('\(80,80\):', canvas.getpixel\(\(80, 80\)\)\); print\('\(100,100\):', canvas.getpixel\(\(100, 100\)\)\); print\('\(120,120\):', canvas.getpixel\(\(120, 120\)\)\)")
